Native Code Plus Screenshot

This article has a <pre><code> block AND an inline screenshot of the same code. The DOM code must be used; no duplicate visual block should be created for the screenshot.

def login(user, password):
    import requests
    r = requests.post(
        'https://api.example.com/v1/login',
        json={'user': user, 'password': password},
    )
    return r.json()

Here is a screenshot of the same code (decorative — DOM text already exists):

End of article.
